Stereochem.description: Biology unambiguously requires D-stereochemistry; deposited Cα coordinates show L-configuration

CCD-Code.description: Non-polymer ligand deposited with D-form CCD code; Cα coordinates correctly model L-form

Mislabel.description: Polymer residue in L-protein labeled with D-amino acid code; no biological justification

Borderline.description: Signed volume below +1.0; near-zero or low magnitude; inconclusive without additional evidence

method: Signed tetrahedron volume at Cα: V = (N-CA) · [(C-CA) × (CB-CA)]
classification_evidence: COMPND records, SEQRES, HET/HETATM, deposition titles, primary literature

2W76.molecule: Pyoverdine siderophore PVD(PA6) from P. aeruginosa
2W76.evidence: D-Ser at position 3 biosynthetically required by NRPS epimerization domain; PMID 19504741

3RIT.molecule: Dipeptide epimerase substrate (L-Arg-L-Lys labeled as L-Arg-D-Lys)
3RIT.evidence: Title says L-Arg-D-Lys product; all 5 copies show L-Lys coordinates; PMID 22392983
